title: verbascum cilicium
intro: Verbascum cilicium, also known as Cilicium or Cretan Mullein, is a perennial plant belonging to the figwort family, native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Verbascum cilicium include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, making it a versatile remedy for various health conditions.
